label: Gaza Deaths Since Oct 7
source: Gaza Ministry of Health / UN OCHA
contestNote: Gaza MoH figures include combatants; IDF estimates ~17,000 militants killed. UN has cited figures as broadly consistent with other data; Israel disputes civilian/combatant ratio.

label: Israelis Killed (Oct 7 Attack)
contestNote: IDF-confirmed figure; Hamas has not disputed the overall casualty scale.
delta: Deadliest day for Jews since the Holocaust

label: Hostages Remaining in Gaza
source: Israeli PM Office / Hostages Families Forum
contestNote: Israeli government count; believed roughly 24 alive as of early 2026, remainder deceased.

label: Displaced People in Gaza
contestNote: ~90% of Gaza's population (2.3M) displaced at peak; ongoing displacement amid resumed operations.

label: Israeli Settlers in West Bank
contestNote: Figure includes East Jerusalem; Israeli government disputes 'settlement' characterization for Jerusalem neighborhoods.

label: UNSC Resolutions on Palestine
contestNote: Includes all UNSC resolutions relating to Arab-Israeli / Israeli-Palestinian conflict since 1948.

label: Registered Palestinian Refugees
contestNote: UNRWA counts descendants of 1948 refugees; Israel argues definition is uniquely broad and perpetuates the conflict. US paused UNRWA funding in 2024.

label: Active ICC Arrest Warrants
contestNote: Warrants issued for PM Netanyahu and former Defense Minister Gallant. Hamas leaders' warrants also sought; Sinwar and Haniyeh killed before full issuance.
